A home loan is a secured loan for buying, building, renovating, or refinancing a residential property. It requires eligibility checks, income verification, and property evaluation. If you want, I can help estimate EMI if you provide loan amount, interest rate, and tenure.

Business loans are provided to eligible enterprises to support expansion, manage working capital, cover operational expenses, purchase machinery, and develop infrastructure. They require eligibility checks and income verification. Let me know if you want more details!
